target_url.description: URL of the target system being assessed

distance_km.description: Distance from billing address to transaction IP in kilometers

distance_from_last_transaction.description: Distance from last transaction location in kilometers

ratio_to_median_purchase_price.description: Transaction amount divided by user's median spending

retailer_history.description: Whether the merchant is in user's transaction history

has_chip.description: Whether transaction uses EMV chip authentication

is_online.description: Whether this is a Card-Not-Present (CNP) transaction
